q: As I entered the room, the first thing that struck me as odd, was the candle still _______ on the table.
A mask is used to hide the identity _______ a person.
There are many inventions of science _______ have benefitted human beings in many ways.
In our country, _______ universities offer a range of courses. That's why foreign students prefer Indian universities.
The report concludes that _______ learners have _______ knowledge of astrophysics.
He was a renowned business person. He _______ (purchase) a house in the city last year.
It _______ be our concerted effort not to employ children in industries and to save them from any kind of exploitation.
When they began to play it _______ to rain.
The teacher distributed a piece of paper to _______ student.
Oral hygiene _______ be inculcated in children early in life.
The information given here _______ to all the products in this section.
Please do not hesitate to contact me if I can be of _______ (assist) in any way.
A notice is a type of social _______ used to notify or present information to a specific set of people.
After she _______ her homework, Anaisha finally relaxed and watched a movie with her friends.
Welcome to our website! You _______ enjoy 10 percent off on your first purchase with code WELCOME.
